case_title: MADELINE MCKINNON VS. JOOK HOUSE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-10-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. 506 PLAINTIFF MADELINE MCKINNON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOOK HOUSE ENTERTAINMENT LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOSE ROBERTO MONTOYA, GENERAL MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCKINNON, MADELINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOOK HOUSE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00, FOR BREECH OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. $1500.00 FOR THE REMAINDER OF SETTLEMENT PAYMENTS PLUS $1,000.00 FOR ASSOCIATED ATORNEY'S FEES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $73.99 ACCRUED INTEREST, $780.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT JOOK HOUSE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY MCKINNON, MADELINE AS TO DEFENDANT JOOK HOUSE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: OFF CALENDAR (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO ALL JUDGMENT DEBTORS. AS TO DEFENDANT JOOK HOUSE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JOOK HOUSE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC.
DECLARATION OF MADELINE MCKINNON RE: THIRD PARTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCKINNON, MADELINE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 SERVED MAY-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOOK HOUSE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY MCKINNON, MADELINE JOOK HOUSE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY STIENER, YNEZ HEARING SET FOR APR-08-2019 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF EXAMINATION - OFF CALENDAR ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 4/8/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OR OTHER CONTACT INFORMATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCKINNON, MADELINE AS TO DEFENDANT JOOK HOUSE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-08-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
